fields.title: [benchmarks] Capture structured tracing for Criterion and Rust perf harnesses
[benchmarks] Capture structured tracing for Criterion and Rust perf harnesses
[benchmarks] Capture structured tracing for Criterion and Rust perf harnesses
fields.validation_summary: Added opt-in structured tracing hooks to ticket-api Rust perf harnesses: e2e_perf_move_health tests now initialize a low-overhead tracing subscriber and emit stable run-summary events, and representative Criterion move_health benches emit benchmark iteration summary events when tracing is enabled. Validation passed for cargo test -p ticket-api reference_heavy_move_e2e_reports_timings, cargo bench -p ticket-api --bench move_health --no-run, and full cargo test -p ticket-api (97 passed).
